name: frontend
description: Frontend developer: component composition, public-API boundaries, accessibility, component tests.

rules.guidance: Every feature/widget/entity slice exposes a public API through a single index file. Internal modules must not be imported directly from outside the slice.
Prefer composition over inheritance. Shared logic extracted to hooks or utility functions; components remain presentational with clear prop contracts.
Interactive elements need semantic HTML or ARIA roles. Keyboard navigation, focus management, and color contrast must be considered in code review.
Component tests use a real rendering environment (e.g. Testing Library). Test user-visible behavior, not internal implementation details or class names.
Data fetching and side effects belong in lifecycle hooks/effects, not during render. Render functions must be pure and produce consistent output given the same props.
